{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317221294C133B7ECE58CD7F55C"}"},"total":3089},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476131682274902809","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"标注一下！！正好更到了52章！真的好喜欢宝宝的性子猫猫宝宝你是一个猫猫宝宝太可爱了！！真的特别爱吃这种明媚小狗类型！！剧情也很紧凑炒鸡好看哇呀呀呀！就是有的时候宝宝身边跟着的小孩一会云宝一会元宝的🙉还是有两个我没认真看吗。大体都很好看哇呀呀呀呀"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740676858,"group_id":"7410440984808393752","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生命像忧郁的古钟 一旦生锈就发出刺耳的悲吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9jbq9snqAQHaSkJyAZfOtYC22lls/OHE1qMksBwD7JQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ad972ed4e8044fb87b8c60dceaee208~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787670&x-signature=rbxRoPBJS9J5HPGiP1%2Fc0F0%2FwGk%3D","user_id":"2216271026063086","user_name":"yu楼yu"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2216271026063086","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410440984808393752","book_info":{"abstract":"*已完结，超多if线番外可独立品尝*
清纯笨蛋美人受x爹系强势禁欲攻
【双男主+先婚后爱+微万人迷倾向+疯狂雄竞】
【1v1双洁、少许墙纸，养成线，有原书主角攻火葬场】 
檀玉，清纯靓丽男大学生
一朝身穿成虐文小说里倒霉的替嫁男妻。
男妻是个心比天高，命比纸薄的炮灰，他听信主角渣攻兼竹马画的“杀了他我娶你”的大饼，在新婚夜给反派下毒不成反被杀。
不巧，檀玉刚好在新婚夜苏醒。
他看着手中疑似维C的毒药，反手把药塞进花盆。
这个炮灰谁爱当谁当，反正他不当！
然后对提剑来杀他的反派老公一通深情表白
成功苟活^-^
-
仗着有老攻撑腰，檀玉在系统的带领下，打绿茶喷渣男，踹渣爹揍后妈…
可他怎么也没想到，这个世界遍地是g.a.y！
渣男主角攻跪地求原谅：“阿玉我错了，你回头看看我吧。”
嚣张跋扈的小侯爷红着脸：“不当男小三，我给你当狗行吗？”
邪魅的大理寺卿、笨拙的护卫、温柔的同窗…
人善被人、妻，万人嫌变万人迷
檀玉瑟瑟发抖：别暗恋！没结果！我是直男！
偏执爹系的反派见状，揽过腰低头轻吻：“宝宝，怎么这么招人喜欢？”
被一路抱上龙椅的檀玉扶腰：……这福气给你，你要不要？
（*注：攻正宫的地位，小三的肚量，勾栏的做派）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0764d64220966e4ace33ad66963a544f","author":"猫是猫猫头","author_id":"","book_id":"7410440984808393752","book_name":"不是不爱吗？那舔我手的人是谁呀","book_short_name":"玉逢春雪","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8a898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425275651617210905","read_count":"39665","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1201016"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"533","tags":"双男主,系统,双洁,古代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df0a0b951b392196bad942a384c126d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441732&x-signature=Z%2FFwGvLHDT9rRwNIcu96WNQU3EY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4011438533776712","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317221294C133B7ECE58CD7F55C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8218,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":27237},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"author_reply_time":1740678058,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535089686593766169","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好好看啊！！！！前期确实是有一点古早的味道，但后面的剧情非常的流畅，有逻辑的话也非常的通顺。而且，王爷和小玉的感情线也是非常的顺。
对于小玉，就像是洁白无瑕的璞玉，呃，王爷在璞玉上作画的画家。王爷有股阴湿男鬼味又有占有欲极强的引导性恋人（个人理解和感觉啊，如有不同看法，请在下面评论）
然后，作者大大的文笔也是非常好的。对于环境描写，人物形态和性格，还有故事转折以及故事情节发展来说，作者大大的功力可见深厚。","text_exts":[{"e":106,"s":102,"text":"阴湿男鬼","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%98%B4%E6%B9%BF%E7%94%B7%E9%AC%BC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742577328CD7F55C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535089686593766169%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410440984808393752%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%98%B4%E6%B9%BF%E7%94%B7%E9%AC%BC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754404185,"group_id":"7410440984808393752","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每日一摸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+eGnnRV3SyIVv41L9U/ZBAaYFEmkW16RaF5jy2PXFou","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3c7258e339f54ba095d4532c34bc3f73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796524&x-signature=ta2xD50rFYe8CRlJJsHhqz57Kyg%3D","user_id":"3382558813072462","user_name":"起咒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3382558813072462","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410440984808393752","book_info":{"abstract":"*已完结，超多if线番外可独立品尝*

unt":0,"listen_duration":70540,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":149461,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6580},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581496957065134872","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"控制欲超强还泡醋缸的爹系强攻，对受是管的真的严但是也真的拿命宠那种，喜欢这类型的看这篇文会是宝藏，剧情也不错，不喜欢这类型的后面一些互动可能接受不了，因人而异，喜欢再入～
我个人来说看这类型不多，不过这篇倒是看得也蛮开心的，吸引我的更多的是里面的剧情，当然两人的感情和黏糊糊日常我也看得乐呵。
番外真的很多，有将近200章了，看题目的话好像是把两人的十世姻缘都写出来了，不过因为太长了我还没有时间去看，等有时间了慢慢去看。
希望两人在哪个世界都幸福恩爱𓆩♡𓆪𓆩♡𓆪"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765206790,"group_id":"7410440984808393752","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只看耽、只看甜。爱写书评、正常五星。书评里的小说一般都给五星了（这些要么神作、要么有瑕疵但是也不严重）；雷多或者过蠢的小说在书评里不会出现，毕竟这类让人根本读不下去、也没有打分的想法。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8E6tlp6sfuWeUxFMgi02IOhOwF8Fv3ymAQuZjKDufA3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6fd55cdb16a4470498fee3a1ed981726~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787339&x-signature=ne08LIN0lsSgC0X8sPVL4CaCRfU%3D","user_id":"3578242955740080","user_name":"伊梦若茜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3578242955740080","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410440984808393752","book_info":{"abstract":"*已完结，超多if线番外可独立品尝*
